spec.template.spec.containers: - env: - name: OPENAI_API_KEY valueFrom: secretKeyRef: key: openai-api-key name: sandboxed-react-agent-secrets - name: OPENAI_MODEL value: gpt-4o-mini - name: SANDBOX_MODE value: cluster - name: SANDBOX_API_URL value: http://sandbox-router-svc.alt-default.svc.cluster.local:8080 - name: SANDBOX_TEMPLATE_NAME value: python-runtime-template - name: SANDBOX_NAMESPACE value: alt-default - name: AGENT_MAX_TOOL_CALLS_PER_TURN value: '4' image: docker.io/mylonasc/magarathea:sandboxed-react-agent-backend-0.1.6 imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent livenessProbe: httpGet: path: /api/health port: 8000 initialDelaySeconds: 15 periodSeconds: 20 name: backend ports: - containerPort: 8000 readinessProbe: httpGet: path: /api/health port: 8000 initialDelaySeconds: 5 periodSeconds: 10 resources: limits: cpu: '1' memory: 1Gi requests: cpu: 250m memory: 256Mi
spec.selector: app: sandboxed-react-agent-backend
kind: Deployment apiVersion: apps/v1 metadata: name: sandboxed-react-agent-frontend ...
spec.selector: app: sandboxed-react-agent-frontend
